intro: Hunt or be hunted in a world where every step could be your last.
description:
Step into a prehistoric world where danger is everywhere. Towering cliffs, dense jungles, and ancient predators surround you. You are a lone hunter — and survival is your only goal.

Your small metal base is your only safe place. Here you restore health and stamina, upgrade your medical injector, and improve your weapons and gear. Each new level unlocks stronger tools and deadly upgrades that help you face bigger threats.

Dinosaurs are both enemies and resources. Hunt them for skins, bones, and teeth, or go after the rare dinosaur eggs — high-risk, high-reward treasures guarded by the fiercest creatures.

Choose your challenge. In Arena Mode, face endless waves of predators where speed, accuracy, and movement are your best friends. In Mission Mode, infiltrate nests, grab eggs, and escape alive — sneak past enemies or fight your way through.

Every hunt makes you stronger. Earn skill points to boost health, endurance, or healing, and shape your hunter into a true apex predator.

Key Features:
- Survive a deadly prehistoric world filled with aggressive dinosaurs.
- Upgrade your base, weapons, and hunter skills to stay alive.
- Hunt dinosaurs for skins, bones, teeth, and rare eggs.
- Two intense modes: Arena (endless waves) and Missions (dangerous nests).
- Customize your hunter with skill points: tougher, faster, or faster healing.
- Collect resources, enhance your gear, and turn simple weapons into deadly tools.

Primal Dinosaur Shooter – Dino Killer — survive the wild, collect rare loot, and become the hunter dinosaurs fear.
